title: pr-minder config
description: Configuration for the pr-minder GitHub App. Supports JSONC (comments allowed). Place at .github/pr-minder.json in any repo, or at pr-minder.json in the org's .github repo (with optional per-repo overrides under 'repos').

repos.description: Per-repo config overrides. Only meaningful in the org-level .github/pr-minder.json; ignored in per-repo config files.

triggerCondition.description: A single trigger condition. All specified keys must match (AND). Multiple conditions in the triggers array are ORed.

approved_by.description: PR must be approved by at least one of these GitHub usernames.

min_approvals.description: PR must have at least this many approvals from any users.

enabled.description: Disable pr-minder entirely for this repo.

triggers.description: List of trigger conditions. Any passing condition fires a branch update (OR). Keys within a condition are ANDed.

repoConfig.description: Per-repo overrides. Supports the same fields as the top-level config, except 'repos'.
